proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with poor performance status (ecog_ps >= 2) have shorter pfs_months than those with ecog_ps < 2.
Higher ecog_ps (continuous, 0-4) is associated with shorter pfs_months in linear regression.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS ECOG>=2=2.908 vs ECOG<2=4.557; diff=-1.649 months (Welch t p=0.00e+00).
OLS coef for ecog_ps = -1.190 months per 1-point increase, p=0.00e+00.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS stage_iv=1=3.703 vs stage_iv=0=5.055; diff=-1.352 months (Welch t p=0.00e+00).
OLS slope = +0.465 months per g/dL, p=3.25e-115.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher serum CEA (cea_ng_ml) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope on log1p(cea) = -0.153 months per log-unit, p=5.29e-44.
OLS slope = -0.0317 months per 100 U/L (raw coef=-0.00032), p=1.26e-02.
OLS slope = -0.073 months per 1% weight loss, p=2.21e-167.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with braf_v600e=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with braf_v600e=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have different pfs_months than patients with msi_high=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS braf_v600e=1=4.094 vs braf_v600e=0=4.322; diff=-0.228 months (Welch t p=3.47e-07).
Mean PFS msi_high=1=4.293 vs msi_high=0=4.313; diff=-0.019 months (Welch t p=6.80e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In KRAS wild-type patients (kras_mutation=0), treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab; this benefit is absent or reversed in KRAS-mutated patients (kras_mutation=1) — a negative cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction.
Among KRAS wild-type patients (kras_mutation=0), treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab.
Among KRAS-mutated patients (kras_mutation=1), treatment_cetuximab is associated with shorter pfs_months than no cetuximab (resistance / harm).

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab main effect (KRAS wt) = -0.048 mo (p=1.03e-01); cetuximab×kras_mutation interaction = +0.020 mo (p=6.65e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t on cetuximab within kras_mutation==0 subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS cetux+ KRAS wt=4.415 vs cetux- KRAS wt=4.463; diff=-0.048 months (Welch t p=1.22e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t on cetuximab within kras_mutation==1
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS cetux+ KRAS mut=4.102 vs cetux- KRAS mut=4.130; diff=-0.028 months (Welch t p=3.76e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative interaction between treatment_cetuximab and nras_mutation on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit is reduced/reversed in NRAS-mutated patients.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_cetuximab and braf_v600e on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit is reduced/reversed in BRAF V600E-mutated patients.
Among patients who are RAS/BRAF wild-type (kras_mutation=0, nras_mutation=0, braf_v600e=0), treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.007 mo, p=9.60e-01.
Interaction coef = -0.026 mo, p=8.05e-01.

analyses.code: Welch t on cetuximab in triple-WT subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS cetux+ RAS/BRAF wt=4.444 vs cetux- RAS/BRAF wt=4.489; diff=-0.045 months (Welch t p=1.70e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and msi_high on pfs_months: pembrolizumab benefit is greater in MSI-high patients.
Among MSI-high patients (msi_high=1), treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Among MSS patients (msi_high=0), treatment_pembrolizumab is NOT associated with longer pfs_months versus no pembrolizumab (null/negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.002 mo, p=9.88e-01.

analyses.code: Welch t on pembrolizumab within msi_high==1
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS pembro+ MSI-H=4.299 vs pembro- MSI-H=4.292; diff=+0.007 months (Welch t p=9.57e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t on pembrolizumab within msi_high==0
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS pembro+ MSS=4.317 vs pembro- MSS=4.312; diff=+0.005 months (Welch t p=8.61e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_encorafenib and braf_v600e on pfs_months: encorafenib benefit is greater in BRAF V600E-mutant patients.
Among BRAF V600E-mutant patients (braf_v600e=1), treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib.
Among BRAF wild-type patients (braf_v600e=0), treatment_encorafenib is NOT associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.141 mo, p=3.76e-01.

analyses.code: Welch t on encorafenib within braf_v600e==1
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS encora+ BRAFmut=3.979 vs encora- BRAFmut=4.108; diff=-0.129 months (Welch t p=3.29e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t on encorafenib within braf_v600e==0
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS encora+ BRAFwt=4.333 vs encora- BRAFwt=4.321; diff=+0.013 months (Welch t p=7.18e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib and her2_amplified on pfs_months: HER2-targeted therapy is more beneficial in HER2-amplified patients.
Among HER2-amplified patients (her2_amplified=1), treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months than no trastuzumab/tucatinib.
Among HER2-non-amplified patients (her2_amplified=0), treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is NOT associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.063 mo, p=7.78e-01.

analyses.code: Welch t on trastuzumab_tucatinib within her2_amplified==1
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS TT+ HER2amp=4.273 vs TT- HER2amp=4.256; diff=+0.017 months (Welch t p=9.34e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t on trastuzumab_tucatinib within her2_amplified==0
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS TT+ HER2-=4.271 vs TT- HER2-=4.317; diff=-0.046 months (Welch t p=2.32e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no bevacizumab in the overall cohort.
The benefit of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months does NOT differ between KRAS-mutated and KRAS wild-type patients (no interaction).
There is an interaction between treatment_bevacizumab and venous_thromboembolism_history on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS bev+=4.301 vs bev-=4.320; diff=-0.019 months (Welch t p=3.54e-01).
Interaction coef = -0.004 mo, p=9.15e-01.
Interaction coef = -0.141 mo, p=1.03e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with right_sided_primary=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with right_sided_primary=0.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_cetuximab and right_sided_primary on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit is reduced or reversed in right-sided primaries.
Among left-sided RAS/BRAF wild-type patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab (largest expected benefit).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS right-sided=4.114 vs left-sided=4.419; diff=-0.305 months (Welch t p=1.04e-49).
Interaction coef = +0.026 mo, p=5.83e-01.

analyses.code: Welch t on cetuximab in left-sided triple-WT subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS cetux+ leftRASwt=4.617 vs cetux- leftRASwt=4.684; diff=-0.067 months (Welch t p=1.25e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Female patients (sex_female=1) have different pfs_months than male patients (sex_female=0).
Higher age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Mean pfs_months differs across categories of race_ethnicity.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS female=4.308 vs male=4.314; diff=-0.006 months (Welch t p=7.70e-01).
OLS slope = +0.1765 months per year of age, p=0.00e+00.
ANOVA F-test p=4.79e-01; group means range = 0.134 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without liver mets.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without bone mets.

In a multivariable model adjusting for stage_iv, albumin, log_cea, ldh, weight_loss, age, liver_mets, bone_mets, and right_sided_primary, ecog_ps remains independently associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS liver_mets=1=4.296 vs liver_mets=0=4.314; diff=-0.019 months (Welch t p=5.19e-01).
Mean PFS bone_mets=1=4.337 vs bone_mets=0=4.305; diff=+0.031 months (Welch t p=2.25e-01).
Adjusted ecog_ps coef = -1.177 mo per point (p=0.00e+00); model R²=0.8282.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope = -0.00202 mo per mg/L, p=6.50e-02.
OLS slope = +0.0052 mo per unit, p=2.90e-01.
OLS slope = -0.010 mo per g/dL, p=7.77e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ast_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope = -0.000595 mo per U/L, p=4.13e-03.
OLS slope = +0.00087 mo per U/L, p=3.22e-01.
OLS slope = -0.065 mo per mg/dL, p=4.40e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope = -0.002 mo per grade, p=8.53e-01.
OLS slope = -0.002 mo per pain point, p=5.47e-01.
OLS slope = -0.000 mo per grade, p=9.83e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with heart_failure=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without heart failure.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without CKD.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without diabetes.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS HF=1=4.312 vs HF=0=4.312; diff=+0.001 months (Welch t p=9.82e-01).
Mean PFS CKD=1=4.340 vs CKD=0=4.308; diff=+0.032 months (Welch t p=3.14e-01).
Mean PFS DM=1=4.302 vs DM=0=4.314; diff=-0.013 months (Welch t p=6.11e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without prior chemo.
Longer years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months (more advanced/refractory disease).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope = +0.008 mo per prior line, p=3.88e-01.
Mean PFS priorchemo=1=4.309 vs priorchemo=0=4.314; diff=-0.005 months (Welch t p=8.20e-01).
OLS slope = +0.009 mo per year, p=1.42e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T) genotype dose is associated with pfs_months (potentially affecting fluoropyrimidine response).
snp_rs4244285 (CYP2C19*2) genotype dose is associated with pfs_months.
At least one of the SNPs in this dataset (snp_rs* columns) is associated with pfs_months at p<0.05.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope = +0.013 mo per allele, p=5.46e-01.
OLS slope = +0.024 mo per allele, p=3.35e-01.
Top SNP = snp_rs1050828 eff=+0.092 mo, p=1.53e-02; 3/27 SNPs nominally significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have different pfs_months than patients with rural_residence=0.
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: F-test p=2.19e-01; max-min group mean diff = 0.082 mo.
Mean PFS rural=1=4.331 vs rural=0=4.307; diff=+0.024 months (Welch t p=3.39e-01).
OLS slope = +0.0033 mo per year, p=3.37e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: More smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with pleural_effusion=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without pleural effusion.
Patients with pericardial_effusion=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without pericardial effusion.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope = +0.0000 mo per pack-year, p=9.13e-01.
Mean PFS pleff=1=4.268 vs pleff=0=4.319; diff=-0.052 months (Welch t p=6.88e-02).
Mean PFS periceff=1=4.236 vs periceff=0=4.315; diff=-0.079 months (Welch t p=1.19e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib is associated with different pfs_months than no regorafenib in the overall cohort.
There is an interaction between treatment_regorafenib and prior_lines_of_therapy on pfs_months.
There is an interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and tp53_mutation on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS rego+=5.089 vs rego-=4.117; diff=+0.972 months (Welch t p=1.71e-216).
Interaction coef = +0.016 mo, p=4.77e-01.
Interaction coef = -0.021 mo, p=7.18e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusting for clinical, lab, biomarker, and treatment covariates, the joint set of biomarker × matched-treatment interactions (cetuximab×KRAS, cetuximab×NRAS, cetuximab×BRAF, pembrolizumab×MSI, encorafenib×BRAF, trastuzumab/tucatinib×HER2) is jointly significant for pfs_months.
In the multivariable model, the cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction remains negative and significant for pfs_months after adjustment.
In the multivariable model, the pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction remains positive and significant for pfs_months after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Joint Wald F p=7.36e-01; model R²=0.8612.
Adjusted interaction coef = +0.021 mo, p=2.31e-01.
Adjusted interaction coef = +0.054 mo, p=2.65e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and sex_female on pfs_months.
There is an interaction between treatment_bevacizumab and age_years on pfs_months (e.g., reduced benefit at older ages).
There is an interaction between treatment_cetuximab and ecog_ps on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit varies with performance status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.037 mo, p=5.15e-01.
Interaction coef = +0.0000 mo per year, p=9.90e-01.
Interaction coef = +0.035 mo per point, p=2.54e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among RAS/BRAF wild-type patients, treatment_cetuximab remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment for age, sex, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin, log-CEA, ldh, and right-sided primary.
Among MSI-high patients, treatment_pembrolizumab remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment for age, sex, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin, log-CEA, and ldh.
Among BRAF V600E-mutant patients, treatment_encorafenib remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment for age, sex, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin, log-CEA, and ldh.
Among HER2-amplified patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjustment for age, sex, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin, log-CEA, and ldh.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted cetuximab coef = -0.024 mo (p=1.67e-01); n=25324.
Adjusted pembrolizumab coef = +0.034 mo (p=5.24e-01); n=2513.

analyses.code: smf.ols multivariable on BRAF V600E subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted encorafenib coef = -0.019 mo (p=4.46e-01); n=2272.
Adjusted T/T coef = +0.008 mo (p=9.35e-01); n=1504.
